Shop.disclaimerText: Remember that when reading reviews, product information, and other articles on the Internet, everyone's body chemistry is different. What helps someone's body may not help yours. Also, what doesn't help another person's body may help yours greatly. Therefore, relying solely on reviews and anecdotal statements from others is not wise for your specific health condition. Rather, it is always recommended to fully understand your medical condition before starting any new type of product.
